owner_facing_goal: Provide the one supported sword for a server-authoritative five-move cultivation combat foundation while retaining mapped vanilla diamond-sword behavior in vanilla mode.

creative_tab.ordering: Immediately after myvillage:rideable_flying_sword; the two items remain independent.

behavior.server_client_boundary: In vanilla mode the item follows the unmodified Minecraft SwordItem path. In cultivation mode only a remap-safe client attack-key event is canceled; the client sends empty toggle/attack intents and the server owns mode, move, timing, hit volume, targets, damage, step movement, recovery, and synchronization.
behavior.interaction: Mapped vanilla left-click attack/mining outside the exact cultivation-mode Qingfeng interception; five server-selected basic sword moves inside it. The item has no right-click summon, ride, recall, or GeckoLib behavior.
behavior.cooldown_or_durability: Diamond-tier durability 1561. Vanilla mode uses ordinary cooldown and durability. Cultivation timing is move-owned, retains a recovery lock across cancel attempts, and charges ordinary sword attack durability once per action with at least one successful target.
data_components: No item-owned combo or mode component
tests: Exact mapped diamond-tier durability, attack damage, attack speed, enchantment value, repair ingredient, and sword tag
Vanilla mode leaves original attack and mining input untouched
Cultivation mode intercepts only this main-hand item and suppresses duplicate swing
Server-authoritative combo, recovery, hit, damage, durability, lifecycle, and payload policy
Rideable flying sword remains a distinct item and entity behavior

jar_checks: Qingfeng Sword class, model, texture, bilingual lang, recipe, and swords tag are packaged
Seven myvillage player-animation ids are packaged below assets/myvillage/player_animations
No com/zigythebird PAL classes or nested PAL jar are shaded into MyVillage

non_goals: Reuse of myvillage:rideable_flying_sword item, entity, or interaction
Epic Fight, Better Combat, old PlayerAnimator, or copied third-party assets
Dodge, block, parry, stamina, poise, super armor, or complex hurt animation
Air combo, sword projectile, spiritual-power cost, realm scaling, proficiency, special sword art, flying-sword attack, or lock-on
Global replacement of unsupported items or mob combat
